title: Moltaí
subtitle: Taispeáin na scileanna is féidir leat a thairiscint agus féach ar na formhuinithe atá comhroinnte ag na baill.
skillsIntro: Coinnigh do scileanna próifíle reatha ionas gur féidir le comharsana an cúnamh a thairiscint duit a fháil.
endorsementsIntro: Cuidíonn formhuinithe ó bhaill eile leis an bpobal do chuid láidreachtaí a thuiscint.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Browse skill categories shared by members in your community.
discover.emptyHint: Skill categories will appear here when members start adding skills.
discover.loadSkillsError: Could not load skills for this category.
discover.noSkillsInCategory: No skills have been added in this category yet.
discover.loadMembersError: Could not load members for this skill.
discover.noMembers: No members found for this skill yet.

noSkills: Níl aon scileanna curtha leis go fóill.
noSkillsHint: Cuir scileanna leis is féidir leat a roinnt le do phobal.
endorseError: Níorbh fhéidir an moladh a chur leis.
addSkillError: Níorbh fhéidir an scil a chur leis.
removeSkillErrorTitle: Scil a thaispeánfar do bhaill, beidh siad le feiceáil i anseo.
removeSkillError: Níorbh fhéidir an scil a bhaint.
noEndorsements: Níl aon mholtaí ann go fóill.
noEndorsementsHint: Nuair a thacaíonn baill le do scileanna, beidh siad le feiceáil anseo.
messagePlaceholder: Mínigh cén fáth a bhfuil tú ag moladh na scile seo…
